intro: Lemaireocereus littoralis, also known as the 'Dungeness spineless prickly pear cactus', is a species of cactus native to the coastal regions of Mexico and Baja California. This plant is rich in health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antidiabetic properties, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and diabetes.
